intro: Epicharis caulostachya, also known as Yellow Epicharis or Yellow Epicharis Herb, is a tropical plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae, native to Southeast Asia and Australia. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Epicharis caulostachya include flavonoids, terpenoids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal activities.
